app.welcome: Best Restaurants in the city, are waiting for you
app.welcome2: Unique experiences, amazing restaurants and charming places
bullets.quality.slogan: We upload the places that we visit only if they get over the quality standards
bullets.objectivity.slogan: Weren't influenced by brands or companies, transparency and objectivity first
bullets.empathy.slogan: We put ourselves in the customer's shoes and seek to make their experience perfect!
quality.standard.slogan: Discover the must-haves that any place must have to appear on Itineramio
footer.slogan: Itineramio is a community of people passionate about discovering the infinity of gastronomic places of essential visit in the city of Alicante
